entry.title: Starlit Wanderer
entry.content:
What It Is

Starlit Wanderer is an exploration game in which the player acts as an astronaut adrift in space and, in their final moments, they reminisce on their childhood.

The game is organized as a series of mini-games reflecting the astronaut's childhood, intercut with their current reality, floating out into space.

Starlit Wanderer was created and developed over 48 hours for the 2024 Granola.gg Game Jam, by a rather large team of seven.

Development

For most of my teammates, this was our first serious game jam, where we intended to create a product that we were all proud of. This was the first time we'd applied project management to a real-life context, with varying degrees of success.

I acted as the 2D and technical artist. As the main visual artist, my role also involved communicating with my other teammates to deliver assets that accurately reflected our narrative and were relevant to gameplay.

Roles

  • 2D/Technical Artist

Tools

  • Aseprite
  • Davinci Resolve
  • GitHub Version Control

Relevant Links

  • Project Link

entry.title: Sharkadelic - Design
entry.content:
What It Is

Toyhouse is a website for creatives, artists, and writers to store information about their stories, art, and designs. A unique feature of the site is the ability for users to customize nearly every aspect of their account through HTML snippets and templates, colloquially known as codes. Since Toyhouse's front-end utilizes a customized release of Bootstrap 4.0, all "codes" written specifically for the site used this format.

Toyhouse also offers the option for users to customize the CSS of their pages through external stylesheets that may also be stored on the site.

Development

I was active on Toyhouse and releasing from the years of 2021 to around 2024 and essentially taught myself Bootstrap 4.0 and Sass through the work I designed and published onto the site. Through trial-and-error, I learned to cultivate my own "style" of web design, aiming for a minimalist yet energetic feeling.

The nature of Bootstrap as a framework build for facilitating responsive website design, which is something that I took in stride.

Roles

  • Web Designer I designed and developed all templates .

  • Storefront Owner & Manager

Tools

  • Visual Studio Code

Relevant Links
